audit_items.proof_trace: When withValidation=true, L404 computes isZero = (price == 0) after all price sources (Data Streams and Data Feed fallback) are resolved, and L410-412 explicitly reverts with ZeroFeedData() if isZero is true. All callers using withValidation=true (BaseAuction L315, L342, L429; GPV2CompatibleAuction L153) pass the flag directly with no bypass path; the zero check is on the final resolved uint256 price and cannot be skipped.
